component.name: SectionsGrid
component.script:
sub init() print "SectionsGrid: init()" m.list = m.top.findNode("sectionList") m.panelLabel = m.top.findNode("panelLabel") setupList() end sub
sub setupList() m.list.itemComponentName = "SectionCard" m.list.itemSize = [252, 88] m.list.itemSpacing = [0, 4] m.list.numRows = 6 m.list.observeField("itemSelected", "onSectionSelected") m.list.observeField("itemFocused", "onSectionFocused") end sub
sub onContentChange(event as Object) node = event.getData() m.list.content = node count = node.getChildCount() m.panelLabel.text = "SECTIONS (" + mid(stri(count), 2) + ")" end sub
sub onSectionFocused(event as Object) m.top.focusedSection = event.getData() end sub
sub onSectionSelected(event as Object) idx = event.getData() print "SectionsGrid: selected index=" + stri(idx) m.top.selectedSection = idx end sub
sub onActivateChange(event as Object) if event.getData() = true m.list.setFocus(true) m.panelLabel.color = "0x00FFFFFF" else m.panelLabel.color = "0x5050A0FF" end if end sub
' Intercept Right key and signal the scene via a field toggle ' Up/Down/OK/Back are left to the MarkupList to handle naturally function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press = false then return false if key = "right" ' Toggle field - scene observes this and calls btvOpenDrawer(next) m.top.requestFocusRight = not m.top.requestFocusRight return true end if return false end function
